headline: Terms of service
subheadline: These terms are written to support a real commercial website, not a placeholder page. They set expectations for access, acceptable use, payments, and operational limits.

sections.title: Service access
sections.description: Access to products, services, and admin-controlled deliverables may be suspended or limited if misuse, security risk, non-payment, or abusive activity is detected.

sections.title: Payments and subscriptions
sections.description: Paid services, subscriptions, and implementation offers are billed through approved payment providers. Fees are generally non-refundable except where required by law or expressly stated otherwise in writing.

sections.title: Customer responsibilities
sections.description: Customers remain responsible for the legality of their content, the accuracy of submitted information, and the decisions they make using generated outputs, analytics, or automation workflows.

sections.title: Reasonable limits
sections.description: The platform is provided on an as-available basis. Liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, but nothing on this page removes rights that cannot legally be waived.

cta.heading: Review pricing and contact support before committing to a plan.
cta.body: This keeps the buying path transparent and reduces disputes by aligning offers, expectations, and support scope before payment.
